title: abutilon pannosum var. scabrum
intro: Abutilon pannosum var. scabrum, also known as the thorny Indian mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon pannosum var. scabrum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
